# terrible_community_general_ipmi_power (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Hostname or IP address of the BMC.
- `password` (String) Password to connect to the BMC.
- `user` (String) Username to use to connect to the BMC.

### Optional

- `key` (String) Encryption key to connect to the BMC in hex format.
- `machine` (String) Provide a list of the remote target address for the bridge IPMI request, and the power status. Either this option or `state` is required.
- `port` (Number) Remote RMCP port.
- `state` (String) Whether to ensure that the machine in desired state. The choices for state are: `on` -- Request system turn on. `off` -- Request system turn off without waiting for OS to shutdown. `shutdown` -- Have system request OS proper shutdown. `reset` -- Request system reset without waiting for OS. `boot` -- If system is off, then `on`, else `reset`. Either this option or `machine` is required.
- `timeout` (Number) Maximum number of seconds before interrupt request.

### Read-Only

- `powerstate` (String) The current power state of the machine.
- `status` (String) The current power state of the machine when the machine option is set.
